message:
feat(polyfills): add readline, DNS lookupService, TLS certs, event loop monitor

Phase 11 polyfill enhancements:
- Add readline module with Interface class, promises API, terminal control
- Add DNS lookupService using getnameinfo() for reverse lookup
- Add DNS getServers/setServers for server configuration
- Add TLS certificate methods (getPeerCertificate, getCipher, getProtocol)
- Add TLS session methods (getSession, isSessionReused)
- Fix querystring.parse with native URL decoding (no JS dependency)
- Add monitorEventLoopDelay with real interval tracking
- Fix performance.now() recursion bug
